Fixes # (issue)

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check background.js content-script.js sidepanel/panel.js` passes
- [ ] `manifest.json` and `assets/frame-config.json` are still valid JSON
- [ ] Tested manually on a simple static page **and** a heavy SPA
- [ ] Follows the project conventions (vanilla JS, no framework/bundler, messaging via `background.js`)
- [ ] Device frames (if any) are real PNG photos, not drawn in code
- [ ] Docs (README/CONTRIBUTING) updated if usage or setup changed
